name: DreamPusher　メダルゲーム
short_description: Easy operation with just a tap! It's a medal pusher game like in an arcade! The maximum number of JP payouts is 99999, which is a threat!
detailed_description:
Dream Pusher can be played in a total of 8 games such as medal pusher games that are common in arcades, physical lottery games, and video slots.
Some games have a ranking function that allows you to compete with players from all over the country.

[Customization function]
Various items can be set from the options for the pusher game.
You can play with your favorite settings.

[Differences from the Android version]
・The field size of the pusher game is about 1.5 times larger.
・Can play in online mode.
・The frame rate up to 120 FPS.
・No advertisement is displayed.
・Ranking data is saved separately from the Android version.

[Operation for PC version]
F11: Switching window size
Alt + Enter: Full screen switch
